parameters.name: Rule
parameters.description:
The rule content. Use a conditional expression to match user requests. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration. There are two scenarios:

- Match all incoming requests: Set the value to \`true\`.

- Match specific requests: Set the value to a custom expression, such as: \`(http.host eq "video.example.com")\`.

parameters.name: RuleEnable
parameters.description:
The rule switch. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration. Valid values:

- on: Enable the rule.

- off: Disable the rule.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The rule name. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration.

parameters.name: Sequence
parameters.description: The rule execution order. A smaller value indicates higher priority.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: The site ID. Get it by calling the [ListSites](~~2850189~~) API.
